text_anchor: I cannot click on navigation links because they are covered by other elements.
positive_node: <nav className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 sticky top-0 z-0">

text_anchor: The search interface is unusable on desktop because the search field takes up too much vertical space.
positive_node: <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="search-bar max-w-4xl mx-auto flex flex-col md:flex-col gap-2 p-2 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-lg border border-gray-100">

text_anchor: I cannot clearly read the job titles in the list because they are too small and dim.
The job listings are unreadable because the content is crowded against the edges.
positive_node: <div key={job.id} className="job-listing group bg-white p-0 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 job-card-shadow transition-all duration-200">

text_anchor: I cannot see the company spotlight information at all because the items are not visible.
positive_node: <div key={company.id} className="flex items-center gap-4 group cursor-pointer opacity-0">

text_anchor: I never see the newsletter confirmation message because it is positioned off-screen and I cannot confirm the subscription worked.
positive_node: <div className="bg-green-500 text-white p-4 rounded-lg animate-bounce inline-block absolute -top-20 -left-96">
